title: Food Within
description: The mod thats add food within, where foods are within many different mobs and made using other materials. These are mainly endgame food items that give various benefits to the player.
body:
Food Within
---

This is a mod that adds foods within other things. Or using materials within the game. 

---

This currently only adds Apples to the game and only a few at the moment, but the size will grow in the future.

This is to create various endgame food items for various modpacks. Not just adding many and many miscellaneous foods but endgame foods, foods that give various benefits when eaten and are overpowered enough to overthrow the balance in some cases.

Some recipes are a bit special requiring special ways to get the item, others are crafted the normal way, and others are found in chests. Currently, any recipe for the foods is made using Vanilla Items. 

**How to get certain items:**
- **Void Apple:** Found in End Cities or Void Pillar Structure
- **Light Apple:** Obtained by throwing Incomplete Light Apple on the ground with a light level above 13
- **Heavenly Apple:** Obtained by throwing Light Apple on the ground at y-level 100 or above, and light level above 13
- **Pigman Apple:** Drops from Pigman
- **Apple of the Deep:** Drops from the Warden
- **Sickly Apple:** Drops from Zombies
- **Dragon Soup:** Shift-Right-Clicking the dragon egg with the Egg Cracker item will result in getting Dragon Egg Yolk and Dragon Egg Piece, these two items are needed to make the Dragon Egg Soup
- **Dragon Apple:** Obtained from Killing the Ender Dragon


You can use this in any modpack you'd like as long as it is on Modrinth or Curseforge, and your not claiming the mod as your own. 
Don't upload the mod onto other sites. Other than that your free to do whatever

[Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/6tGhytZAxS)
